title: A look at the downfall between Mike Pence and Donald Trump
shortDescription: The GOP frontrunner is expected to name vp choice at the Republican National Convention. What happened to his former right-hand man, Mike Pence?

title: OnPolitics: Biden’s conviction is not the end of his legal drama.
shortDescription: Hunter Biden’s conviction in his federal gun trial is not the end of his legal drama.

title: Florida ban on transgender care for children ruled unconstitutional
shortDescription: Comments from Gov. Ron DeSantis and Florida legislators were cited in the judge's ruling as being "overtly biased against transgenders."

title: Here's who Trump endorsed in Nevada's competitive U.S. Senate race
shortDescription: Sam Brown is seen as the one to beat for the GOP nomination but he's also running against Jeff Gunter, a former ambassador to Iceland, under Trump.

title: Hunter Biden's criminal trials spur false claims online | Fact checks
shortDescription: USA TODAY has debunked an array of false and misleading claims about Hunter Biden and the charges against him.

title: South Carolina's primary is today. How many voted early?
shortDescription: South Carolina voters head to the polls Tuesday to vote in the primary — but many already have.

title: 'GUILTY': GOP has mixed reaction to Hunter Biden verdict
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's son was found guilty Tuesday morning. Not all Republicans were thrilled.

title: President Biden says he accepts son Hunter Biden's conviction
shortDescription: President Joe Biden, in a statement, said he accepts the outcome of Hunter Biden's case and will continue to respect the judicial process.

title: What's next for Hunter Biden post-conviction? Legal woes aren't over
shortDescription: Ahead for Hunter Biden is sentencing for his conviction on gun charges and a likely appeal. A second federal trial looms Sept. 5 on tax charges.

title: Biden leads Trump in this swing state in post-conviction poll
shortDescription: A new poll gives President Joe Biden a slight lead over Donald Trump in Minnesota less than 8 months from the presidential election.

title: Debate with Trump looms as Biden family digests Hunter guilty verdict
shortDescription: Joe Biden stayed away from the courthouse and avoided discussing the trial in public. That is going to be tough when he meets Trump in a few weeks.

title: Hunter Biden found guilty on all charges in felony gun trial: Updates
shortDescription: A Delaware jury announced its decision about President Joe Biden’s son, who faces up to 25 years in prison.

title: Lake's Confederate flag flap: Silence from AZ GOP rival Lamb
shortDescription: Kari Lake's appearance in front of a Confederate flag may not be a liability in a GOP primary but could hurt her with other voters.

title: Top House Democrat decries GOP effort to hold AG Garland in contempt

title: 'We will hunt you down,' if Trump wins: Steve Bannon on ex-FBI chiefs
shortDescription: Former Trump advisor Steve Bannon warned the last two ex-FBI directors: 'Get your passport, get the hell out of the country because hey, we're coming'

title: Critical primaries in 4 states Tuesday could loom large for November
shortDescription: In one important contest, S.C. Rep. Nancy Mace's primary could serve as a test of Trump's strength with the GOP base. She's also a VP contender.

title: Follow the money: Who are the top donors to Biden, Trump and RFK?
shortDescription: We are tracking the presidential election fundraising for Joe Biden, Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. The story will be updated as new filings come in.

title: New York voters backed by DNC sue to keep RFK Jr. off ballot
shortDescription: A lawsuit filed by two New York voters argues Robert F. Kennedy Jr. failed to submit enough valid signatures to run for president in New York.

title: Kohl's was never a GOP convention sponsor, didn't pull out | Fact check
shortDescription: The Wisconsin-based retailer was never a sponsor of the convention in Milwaukee in the first place, a company spokesperson said.

title: Controversial Texas immigration law remains on hold | Fact check
shortDescription: The Supreme Court's March 19 opinion said it was not ruling on whether the law was constitutional. The law remains on hold as litigation continues.

title: Here's the lineup for this year's White House Juneteenth concert
shortDescription: The "Godmother of Soul," Patti LaBelle, Gladys Knight, Brittney Spencer and others to perform tonight at the White House.
